name.english: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana

scheme.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Finance, Government of India
scheme.implementing_agency: Participating Banks and Life Insurance Companies

objective.primary: Provide affordable life insurance coverage to citizens
secondary: Financial protection to families in case of death of earning member
Increase insurance penetration among low-income households
Provide life insurance at nominal premium

life_insurance_cover.payable_on: Death of insured person due to any reason

citizenship.details: Indian resident with a savings bank account

age.note: Entry allowed up to age 50 years

coverage_age_limit.note: Coverage can continue up to age 55 with annual renewal

bank_account.details: Must have an active savings bank account

aadhaar.details: Aadhaar should be linked to bank account

multiple_accounts.note: Only one PMJJBY policy is allowed per individual

medical_examination.details: No medical test required for enrollment

enrollment_process.step_1: Visit participating bank or enroll through net banking/mobile banking
enrollment_process.step_2: Provide consent for annual premium auto-debit
enrollment_process.step_3: Submit required details and nominee information
enrollment_process.step_4: Insurance coverage starts after successful enrollment

claim_process.step_1: Nominee informs bank about death of insured person
claim_process.step_2: Submit claim form and death certificate
claim_process.step_3: Bank verifies details and forwards claim

contact_details.scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
contact_details.managed_by: Ministry of Finance, Government of India
